arts.ttl: Injuries almost all cleared up says Alex Revell as Stevenage head to Blackpool
arts.sum: Manager Alex Revell said: "[Thursday] was the first time we've involved most of them back in the squad and it was really good to see those bits of quality coming back. Victory over Stockport County last time out made it three wins in three and while Saturday's hosts can also boast their statistic, the Boro boss is excited by the improvement in form.
